positive: A minimalist abstract illustration of a crescent moon nestled within a cluster of stylized celestial flowers and constellation lines. The overall aesthetic is vaporwave meets neo-tribal, using limited but rich colors of deep sapphire blue, metallic gold, and soft pastel lavender. The design features strong, clean silhouettes and geometric elements, creating a balanced, repeating pattern suitable for screen printing on apparel. Central composition with negative space, high contrast, crisp vector lines, perfect for repeat textile print, deep engraving style, elegant and mystical.
